title: Write a Parser
description: Parse a structured text format into a usable structure.
content:
Write a parser for this format: {{format}}

Define the grammar or structure first, then implement it in {{language}}. Decide between a hand-written recursive-descent parser and a regex/split approach, and justify it. Produce clear errors with position info on malformed input rather than silently misparsing. Cover the tricky cases: nesting, escaping, whitespace, and empty input. Include a couple of example inputs and their parsed output.
